expectations.text: Agent reads the task state to check the step's current state
expectations.evidence: Transcript confirms reading .taskState.yaml; output reports 'state: revision, revisionCount: 1'

expectations.text: Agent correctly identifies test-generation is NOT in done state
expectations.evidence: Output: 'The test-generation step in the active task (navbar, flow: vsdd) has state revision, not done'

expectations.text: Agent informs user that only completed steps can be optimized
expectations.evidence: Output: 'only completed (done) steps can be optimized, because optimization requires a stable artifact'

expectations.text: Agent stops without presenting optimization points
expectations.evidence: No numbered optimization list in output; agent stopped after stop-condition message

expectations.text: No instruction files are modified during the run
expectations.evidence: No Edit tool calls; agent stopped before any analysis
